title: clinopodium pomelianum
intro: Clinopodium pomelianum, also known as mountain savory, is a plant species in the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Clinopodium pomelianum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Clinopodium pomelianum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
